title: cotoneaster nummularius subvar. meyeri
intro: Cotoneaster nummularius subvar. meyeri, also known as Meyer's Cotoneaster, is a type of flowering evergreen shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues due to its astringent and antimicrobial properties. Cotoneaster nummularius subvar. meyeri can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically made by steeping the leaves and berries in hot water.
